name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fixes shows being misfiled as movies: the organizer no longer treats unrecognised files as movies. It now identifies from embedded tags, then the filename, then the folder structure (show/season folders), and leaves anything it cannot identify exactly where it is. A movie now requires a year as evidence. Added a Preview organize button that shows what would move before anything moves.
